ham-and-cheese-quiche.name: Ham And Cheese Quiche
instructions: Press pastry into the bottom of a 9-inch pie plate. Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes. Poke holes into the pastry with a fork and continue cooking until lightly browned, about 5 minutes more. Remove crust from the oven, and reduce the oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, Swiss cheese, and 1 tablespoon flour in a bowl; spread over warm crust.
Mix ham and honey mustard together in a bowl; spoon over cheese mixture.
Mix half-and-half, eggs, green onions, remaining 1 tablespoon flour, and salt together in bowl.
Pour mixture carefully over ham layer; top with remaining Cheddar cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 40 to 50 minutes until set in the center. Cool briefly before cutting and serving.

hazelnut-and-buckwheat-financiers-with-f.name: Hazelnut And Buckwheat Financiers With Figs
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175°C). Toast hazelnuts on a large rimmed baking sheet until skins are slightly darkened and split, 12–15 minutes. Let cool, then bundle in a kitchen towel and rub vigorously to remove skins (there will definitely be some stubborn pieces that refuse to come off—do what you can). Transfer to a food processor and pulse until finely ground. Whisk hazelnuts, powdered sugar, buckwheat flour, and salt in a medium bowl to combine.
Cook butter in a small saucepan over medium heat until it foams, then browns (be careful not to let it burn), 5–7 minutes. Let cool slightly.

Whisk egg whites in a medium bowl until foamy (you’re not trying to create volume; you just want to break them up), then whisk into dry ingredients. Whisk in brown butter. Cover and chill batter until firm, at least 2 hours.

Reheat oven to 177°C (175°C). Generously coat six 4-oz. fluted financier molds or a standard 12-cup muffin pan with nonstick spray. Divide batter among molds (use about ⅓ cup batter per mold, or 2 mounded Tbsp. if using a muffin pan). Top with figs (if using) and sprinkle with demerara sugar. Bake until tops are browned and edges are firm, 20–25 minutes. Transfer pans to a wire rack and let financiers cool 10 minutes in pans before turning out onto racks. Let cool completely.

heart-cake-argiro.name: Heart Cake

hearty-white-bean-stew.name: Hearty White Bean Stew
instructions: Trim the root end and the tough, dark green top of the leek and remove any thick outer layers. Cut the leek in half lengthwise, then slice into ¼-inch (6-mm) thick half moons.

Transfer to a bowl of water and shake around with your fingers to loosen any dirt or grit. Let the leeks sit in the water for a couple minutes to let any grit to sink to the bottom of the bowl. Carefully remove the cleaned leeks from the bowl, leaving the dirty water behind.
Heat the olive oil in a large, heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat. Add the pancetta and cook until crispy and most of the fat has rendered, about 8 minutes.
Add the leeks, carrots, celery, mushrooms, and garlic. Season with salt. Cook for 5-6 minutes, until the vegetables have released their juices and begin to soften.

Add the thyme leaves, tomatoes, beans, and vegetable stock. Stir to combine, then bring to a boil, cover, and cook, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes until slightly reduced and hot throughout. Season with more salt, to taste.
Ladle into bowls and top with freshly grated Parmesan cheese. Serve with crusty bread.
Enjoy!

honey-bbq-chicken-wings.name: Honey Bbq Chicken Wings
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220°C).
In a bowl, combine flour, chili powder, salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder. Coat the wings in the flour evenly, shaking off any excess.
Place the floured wings on a parchment paper–lined baking sheet and spread them out in a single layer.
Bake for 45 minutes, flipping halfway through, until skin is crispy and golden brown.
Preheat oven to 260°C (250°C).
In a separate bowl, combine the BBQ sauce and the honey. Stir the cooked wings in the sauce and coat them evenly.
Place the coated wings back onto the baking sheet and spread them in a single layer.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, until sauce is bubbly and caramelized. Cool, then serve.
Enjoy!

honey-wheat-sandwich-rolls.name: Honey Wheat Sandwich Rolls

Place on lightly greased cookie sheets; cover and let rise until doubled, about 1 hour. Meanwhile, preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes. When rolls are finished baking, brush with melted butter.

horseman-in-the-sky-cocktail.name: horseman In The Sky" Cocktail
instructions: Bring 5 star anise pods and ½ cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over low heat, shaking pan often, and cook until fragrant and water is reduced by a little more than half, about 5 minutes. Pluck out and discard pods and pour 2 Tbsp. water into a heatproof jar or airtight container. Add honey, seal jar, and shake vigorously until honey is dissolved; chill until cold, 15–20 minutes.

Place a large ice cube into each of 4 rocks glasses. Stir Calvados, rosé, and 2 Tbsp. honey syrup in a cocktail shaker filled with ice until very cold, about 30 seconds. Strain into prepared glasses and top each with a splash of club soda. Garnish with orange slices and remaining star anise pods.

how-to-make-pesto-salmon-phyllo-parcels.name: How To Make Pesto Salmon Phyllo Parcels
instructions: Pat the salmon fillets dry with paper towel and season with salt and pepper. Lay skin-side down on a cutting board or plate and top each fillet with a tablespoon of pesto, or more to taste, ensuring the entire top of the fillet is evenly covered. Set aside while you prepare the phyllo.
Lay a sheet of phyllo flat on a work surface and brush with olive oil. Lay another sheet on top, brushing with oil. Repeat process for a total of four sheets, leaving the top of the last sheet dry.

Place one of the prepared salmon fillets at the bottom of the stack of phyllo sheets with the pesto side facing up. Roll over once, so the skin side is facing up, then fold over the sides. Brush all over with oil.

Continue rolling until the end of the phyllo, then place on the parchment-lined baking sheet with the pesto side facing up and brush the top with oil. Score the top 2 to 3 times to allow steam to release.
Bake parcels in the preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes, until the phyllo is golden brown. Remove from oven and let rest a minute or two before serving.

Above your choice of paper, place the chicken mass and scattering up to a round shape of 0,5 to 1 cm thick.
Once armed, put on a plate and baker for 20 minutes at 180 ″ 3 ″ or until slightly golden or early.
Retira del horno y deja reposar un rato.
Pasado ese tiempo, vierte en la base de pollo la salsa o pasta de tomate, extiende muy bien.
It incorporates mozzarella grated cheese, cherry tomatoes cut in half and ruula.
Hornea for 10 minutes more at 180 and 3 till the base and cheese are framed.
Retira del horno, deja reposar un rato y corta en porciones.

how-to-make-sardines-with-tomato-comeder.name: How To Make Sardines With Tomato

ingredients.item: 1 kg.  sardinas frescas (limpias, sin cabeza ni cola.)

instructions: The sardines should be clear, with no head, no scales and no viscas, we will wash them well to remove the scales that could be left.
In a bowl we will put them with salt and pepper and we will squeal a lemon onto them, leave at rest about 10 minutes for better season.
In a frying pan, we'll pour out the tablespoons of olive oil and we'll scattering the garlic and onion and put the sardines to get them some, about 2 minutes for each side.
Finalmente vertemos nuestra salsa y espolvoreamos cilantro picado muy finamente.
Tapamos y dejamos cocinar por 10 minutos hasta que la salsa se reduzca por la mitad.
Serve hot with whatever you prefer.

He cuts his carrot into small strips, and so did his best with his vanites.
Take your garlic teeth and scrape them.
Warm up a frying pan and add the oil. Then add the garlic and scrape.
When the garlic's cold, add all the vegetables. Also, add salt, pepper and paprika. That's a good mix.
Cover your frying pan and put them down and let them cook for 7 minutes and steam will soften them a little. I don't like to leave them so soft that they don't get rid of them.
Sube el fuego nuevamente y deja que terminen de saltearse y el liquido de los vegetales que haya reducido.
Turn off the fire and leave cold to taste.
We're done!

how-to-make-stollen-bread-for-christmas-.name: How To Make Stolen Bread For Christmas.

instructions: Stretch the almonds so they'll be fine. Do the same with the fruit with confidence.
Add into a bowl scented almonds, raisins and confided fruit. Fold the rum and mix and leave maceration.
Warm up the milk till it's arm. Then add the baker's leave, Honey and 100 grams of wheat flour. Mix very well and let rest for 10 minutes.
In a bowl, add the rest of wheat flour. Open a space at the centre and add the egg and yolk. Butter at room temperature, salt and yast.
Fold with your hands for 7 minutes till you get a smooth and manageable mix.
Filling up your counter and passing your mix there. It amasses very well for another 5 minutes to give you more elasticity.
Do a ball with your dough, put a ball and cover with film paper. Let rest for about 1 hour so that light.
After that time, preheat the oven at 200 been 3.
Retighten your dough and amasa for 5 minutes and add a mixture of condado fruit, almonds and raisins.
It's good till everything's perfectly integrated. Then give your stolen some form of bread. It can be oval or round.
Take a plate and cover with kitchen paper. And put the stolen. Peel with egg or butter.
The temperature drops to 180 ° C and bakes for about 45 minutes.
After that time, the stollen should be doradito and well baked.
Let rest for 20 minutes, then cut into cuts and taste.
Enjoy at Christmas!

how-to-prepare-sausages-in-white-wine-co.name: How To Prepare Sausages In White Wine
how-to-prepare-sausages-in-white-wine-co.original_name: Cómo preparar salchichas al vino blanco
instructions: In a frying pan we heated up olive oil and pitted it with low heat for about 10 minutes. We recommend that you do so with the cover put, so that the onion & quot; will sweat & quot; faster and with steam will be juicy.
Salpimentamos al gusto.
When the onion is pitted, we put the wine and put up the fire.
Let the wine evaporate for 1-2 minutes and then put the sausage in the frying pan. Be sure to turn them around and get them to wear them in a uniform manner.
Put the fire down and let cook with the covered frying pan for 25-30 minutes. Withdraw and serve.

hushpuppies.name: Hushpuppies
instructions: Whisk flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, salt, garlic powder, onion powder, and pepper in a large bowl to combine. Add butter and work in with a pastry blender or your fingers until mixture resembles coarse meal (the largest butter pieces should be no bigger than a pea).

Make a well in the center of flour mixture and add egg and buttermilk to well. Gradually incorporate into dry ingredients, mixing from the center out, until a smooth batter forms. Add onion and jalapeño and mix gently just to evenly disperse (be careful not to overmix).

Pour oil into a large heavy saucepan to come halfway up sides and fit with thermometer. Heat oil over medium-high until thermometer registers 350°. Using a 1-oz. scoop or a tablespoon and working in 2–3 batches, carefully drop balls of batter into oil and fry, turning often with a spider or a slotted spoon and adjusting heat to maintain temperature, until hushpuppies are puffed and deep golden all over, about 4 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain and let cool slightly.
Serve warm hushpuppies with tartar sauce alongside for dipping.
Do Ahead: Batter can be made 2 hours ahead. Cover and chill. Scoop cold batter directly into hot oil and fry.
